commands.review_summary:
Adds a default-disabled `core/doctor/systemd-linger` structured doctor lint check and tests for selected disabled-linger findings.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +50. Total +84 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction. The PR behavior is source-testable and covered under mocks, but the after-fix real Linux CLI path has not been shown.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human review or contributor proof rather than automated repair: the remaining blocker is real Linux CLI evidence, not a narrow code defect.

target.title: Doctor: expose systemd linger findings
target.body:
## Summary

- add default-disabled structured lint findings for `core/doctor/systemd-linger`
- keep legacy interactive/non-interactive linger enablement in the existing Doctor run paths
- report only the actionable `linger=no` state for local Linux mode; unavailable systemd/loginctl and already-enabled lingering stay quiet

## Validation

- `CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm exec oxfmt --write src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (51 tests)
- `CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm tsgo:core`
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`
- `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed`

## Proof

Focused source test proof covers the behavior directly:

- default lint skips `core/doctor/systemd-linger` because it is `defaultEnabled: false`
- explicit `--only core/doctor/systemd-linger` runs the check
- mocked disabled linger emits warning metadata with `target: systemd.user.alice` and `fixHint: Run: sudo loginctl enable-linger alice`

I did not use the local WSL source CLI transcript as proof because the WSL wrapper polluted/mangled the captured JSON during probing. The source tests and `check:changed` proof are clean.

## Contract

No config schema, plugin manifest, SDK, persisted data model, or repair-path contract change. This adds only an opt-in structured Doctor lint finding for existing systemd-linger health behavior.
